sources.title: Anthropic Extended Thinking Documentation
keyInsights: Thinking blocks have type 'thinking' with separate signature field
Streaming emits thinking_delta events before text_delta
display: 'summarized' (default) vs 'omitted' for hiding thinking
Signature field enables multi-turn thinking continuity
Budget tokens control reasoning depth
Thinking blocks must be preserved unmodified in multi-turn tool use

sources.title: DeepSeek Reasoning Model API Documentation
keyInsights: reasoning_content field is separate from content in response
CoT from previous rounds must NOT be concatenated into context
Streaming sends reasoning tokens and content tokens separately
max_tokens includes CoT length
Temperature/top_p parameters are not supported

sources.title: Google Gemini Thinking Documentation
keyInsights: Returns thought summaries not raw thoughts via includeThoughts flag
thought boolean property on response parts identifies thinking
Rolling incremental summaries during streaming
thinkingLevel (Gemini 3) vs thinkingBudget (Gemini 2.5)
thoughtsTokenCount in usage metadata for billing

sources.title: Anthropic - Visible Extended Thinking Announcement
keyInsights: Thinking content appears 'less polished' and 'more detached' by design
No standard character training applied to thinking content
Harmful thinking content is encrypted with user notification
Faithfulness of displayed thoughts is uncertain
Available to Pro, Team, Enterprise, API users

sources.title: Vercel AI SDK - Chatbot UI Documentation
keyInsights: sendReasoning: true in toUIMessageStreamResponse enables reasoning forwarding
message.parts array contains reasoning parts with type 'reasoning'
Reasoning parts stream separately from text content
Supports DeepSeek, Anthropic, and other reasoning providers uniformly

sources.title: Vercel AI Chatbot Template (Next.js)
keyInsights: MessageReasoning component wraps Reasoning/ReasoningTrigger/ReasoningContent
hasBeenStreaming state tracks whether to default-expand reasoning
ThinkingMessage shows pulsing label with staggered bouncing dots
isStreaming prop enables animation during active generation
Built on shadcn/ui and Radix primitives

sources.title: LibreChat - Hide Collapsed Thinking from Screen Readers
keyInsights: aria-hidden={!isExpanded} dynamically hides collapsed content from assistive tech
role='group' with useId() for semantic grouping without polluting landmarks
aria-controls wired to content region id via contentId prop
Applied to both legacy Thinking and modern Reasoning components
FloatingThinkingBar collapse button also has full ARIA wiring

sources.title: LibreChat - Expanded Thinking UI Polish
keyInsights: FloatingThinkingBar uses absolute positioning, appears on hover/focus
Prevents layout expansion during message streaming
Copy Thoughts button with aria-label for screen readers
Dynamic icons for expand/collapse state with tooltip anchors
Full keyboard navigation support

sources.title: LibreChat - Part Component (Content Type Router)
keyInsights: ContentTypes.THINK routes to Reasoning component
Handles both string and object formats for think content
isLast prop indicates streaming state for animation control
Cascading conditional pattern for content type routing

sources.title: LibreChat - MessageContent Component
keyInsights: parseThinkingContent() extracts :::thinking...:::  blocks via regex
Separates thinking content from regular content before rendering
Thinking component imported from Parts/Thinking
Uses memoization to optimize re-renders during streaming

sources.title: Open WebUI - Reasoning Trace Fragmentation Bug
keyInsights: v0.8.0 had reasoning traces split at each token output causing browser hangs
Different API providers stream responses differently
Fix involved restoring proper <think> tag interpretation
Fragmentation linked to connection latency and server config
Critical lesson: never create new DOM nodes per token

sources.title: Open WebUI - Thinking Block Issues (Multiple)
keyInsights: #22267: HTML preview renders code blocks inside thinking blocks incorrectly
#22237: TTS reads thinking content with code blocks (fixed)
#20286: Duplicated responses for thinking models during streaming (fixed)
Uses details HTML elements for collapsible thinking sections
Markdown component handles <think> tag parsing

sources.title: LobeChat - Thinking/Reasoning Issues (Multiple)
keyInsights: #12829: Working on reasoning summaries in non-streaming responses
#13067: Filters internal thinking content in OpenAI-compatible payloads
#12589: Combining thinking models with web search causes issues
Provider-specific thinking toggles needed (enable_thinking for Qwen)

sources.title: LibreChat - TTS Reads Thinking/Reasoning Blocks
keyInsights: TTS should optionally include or exclude thinking content
User toggle requested for thinking in speech output
Thinking with code blocks produces garbled TTS

sources.title: WAI-ARIA Disclosure Pattern Specification
keyInsights: Control must have role='button' with aria-expanded
Enter and Space keys activate the disclosure control
aria-controls optional but recommended for explicit association
Five example implementations including FAQ accordion patterns

sources.title: MDN - HTML details Element Reference
keyInsights: Native HTML disclosure widget with built-in accessibility
open boolean attribute controls state
name attribute for exclusive accordion behavior
toggle event fires after state changes (coalesced for rapid changes)
Widely available since January 2020

sources.title: shadcn/ui - Collapsible Component Documentation
keyInsights: Wraps Radix UI Collapsible primitive
Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger API
Controlled state via open/onOpenChange props
Full RTL support

sources.title: Radix UI - Collapsible Primitive API Reference
keyInsights: CSS variables --radix-collapsible-content-width/height for animations
data-state attribute ('open'/'closed') for CSS targeting
forceMount prop for animation control
Adheres to WAI-ARIA Disclosure pattern

sources.title: NNGroup - Progress Indicators UX Guidelines
keyInsights: Looped indicator for 2-10 second delays
Percent-done indicator for 10+ second delays
Progressive animation: start slower, accelerate toward completion
Include text explanations and time estimates
Users willing to wait 3x longer with visual feedback

sources.title: NNGroup - Skeleton Screens and Shimmer Patterns
keyInsights: Skeleton screens best for full-page loads under 10 seconds
Animated skeletons (shimmer) create perception of shorter waits
Spinners better for single modules under 10 seconds
Avoid skeleton screens for loads under 1 second (flashing is annoying)
Animated skeletons can cause accessibility issues

sources.title: Chrome Developers - Animate to height:auto with CSS
keyInsights: interpolate-size: allow-keywords enables height:auto transitions
calc-size() function for mathematical operations on intrinsic sizes
Chrome 129+ and Edge 129+ support
One endpoint must be a length/percentage for interpolation

sources.title: Chrome Developers - CSS Native Exclusive Accordion
keyInsights: name attribute on details elements creates exclusive accordion
Browser support: Chrome 120+, Edge 120+, Firefox 130+, Safari 17.2+
Progressive enhancement possible with toggle event polyfill

sources.title: React - useTransition Hook Documentation
keyInsights: Enables non-blocking UI updates for streaming content
isPending flag for showing loading states
Prevents jarring loading indicators by keeping revealed content visible
Interruptible: new user interactions cancel in-progress transitions

sources.title: web.dev - Building a Loading Bar Component
keyInsights: Indeterminate animation with gradient-based shimmer at 225% background-size
color-scheme property for automatic dark/light adaptation
Browser-specific selectors for progress element styling
2-second animation cycle for indeterminate state
